creator: radicleparticles@gmail.com
text:
Hmmm - removed "~/.secpanel" reused last modified Makefile (with "OPTIONS_DEFAULT").

Did "make -d cdlmpvx" selecting "MATE-Terminal". No noticeable specifics about terminal choice in debug output (other than echoing Makefile lines).

Then did "make -d cdlmpvx install". Again - no noticeable specifics about terminal choice.

So - I don't know how/why I wound up with "GNOME-terminal" when I tried the latest update of secpanel. Yes, I have something that specifies "x11_gnome-terminal" (probably the GnuPG pinentry port) though the "gnome-terminal" port is not installed. I also cannot duplicate whatever happened before the produced "gnome-terminal".
